creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to aryeh.friedman from comment #6)
> Then there is something wrong with the repo

I don't think so.  Here's what I get

$ svn co https://svn.freebsd.org/ports/head/lang/rust/files
A    files/patch-vendor_openssl-sys_build_cfgs.rs

Checked out revision 501792.

Note how all 7 OpenSSL crate patches are there.

What does 'svnlite status' say on your system?
